searchTerms.title: Search Terms
searchTerms.description: Google Maps search queries. Combined with each region city to source leads.

regions.title: Target Regions
regions.description: Geographic targets with proximity weighting. Birmingham, AL is weighted highest (Summit venue). Each region needs city, state, weight, and radius_km.

maxLeadsPerQuery.title: Max Leads per Query
maxLeadsPerQuery.description: Cap on results returned per (search term × region) combo. Controls cost.

minFleetSignals.title: Min Operator Signals to Qualify
minFleetSignals.description: Minimum positive signals (website, phone, email, reviews) required to mark a lead as qualified.

enableLinkedIn.title: Enable LinkedIn enrichment
enableLinkedIn.description: Pull company pages + decision-maker employees (Owner, Fleet Manager, Safety Director, etc.).

linkedInMaxLeads.title: LinkedIn enrichment cap
linkedInMaxLeads.description: Cap on leads sent to LinkedIn enrichment (cost control).

enableMultiSource.title: Enable Yellow Pages + BBB cross-reference
enableMultiSource.description: Cross-reference leads against Yellow Pages and Better Business Bureau for additional contact data.

enableEmailFinder.title: Enable email pattern generation
enableEmailFinder.description: When name + domain are known but no email is found, generate the most-likely email pattern with MX validation.

enableReplyMonitor.title: Enable Gmail IMAP reply monitor
enableReplyMonitor.description: Polls inbox in metrics_sync + follow_up_only modes — auto-marks replied leads to suppress further follow-ups.

enableReplyAlerts.title: Send reply alerts to Ben
enableReplyAlerts.description: When a lead replies, send a notification email with the full intel brief and reply excerpt.

enableEngagementAlerts.title: Send alerts on clicks + registrations
enableEngagementAlerts.description: Notification when a lead clicks the registration link or completes registration.

alertNotifyEmail.title: Alert Notification Email
alertNotifyEmail.description: Email address to receive reply/engagement alerts. Defaults to senderEmail if blank.

senderName.title: Sender Name
senderName.description: Display name in the From header.

gmailAppPassword.title: Gmail App Password
gmailAppPassword.description: 16-char Gmail App Password (NOT your Gmail login). Generate at myaccount.google.com → Security → 2-Step Verification → App passwords.

summitUrl.title: Summit Page URL
summitUrl.description: Public URL of the Summit page on Swamp Fox website.

registrationFormUrl.title: Registration Form URL
registrationFormUrl.description: Direct link to the registration form. If blank, defaults to summitUrl + #register.

summitDate.title: Summit Day 2 Date
summitDate.description: ISO format. Day 2 is the main Summit date. Day 1 reception is one day prior.

calendlyUrl.title: Booking URL (Calendly/etc.)
calendlyUrl.description: Optional. If set, Touch 2 emails offer a 1:1 call link.

trackingBaseUrl.title: Tracking Server Base URL
trackingBaseUrl.description: Optional override. If blank, the Actor's web server URL is used automatically for opens/clicks/unsub tracking.

trackingKeepAliveMinutes.title: Keep Tracking Server Alive (min after send)
trackingKeepAliveMinutes.description: Holds the tracking server up after sends to capture immediate opens/clicks.

googleSheetId.title: Google Sheet ID
googleSheetId.description: Sheet ID from URL. Leave blank to skip Sheets sync.

googleServiceAccountJson.title: Google Service Account JSON
googleServiceAccountJson.description: Paste the full service-account JSON. Required if writing to Sheets.

fabricEnabled.title: Enable Microsoft Fabric Sync
fabricEnabled.description: Write leads to Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse via Parquet files.

fabricWorkspaceName.title: Fabric Workspace Name
fabricWorkspaceName.description: Name of the Microsoft Fabric workspace.

fabricLakehouseName.title: Fabric Lakehouse Name
fabricLakehouseName.description: Name of the Lakehouse inside the Fabric workspace.

fabricTableName.title: Fabric Table Name
fabricTableName.description: Target Delta table for lead data.

azureTenantId.title: Azure Tenant ID
azureTenantId.description: Azure AD tenant ID for Fabric service principal authentication.

azureClientId.title: Azure Service Principal Client ID
azureClientId.description: Service principal application (client) ID with OneLake Data Contributor permission.

dryRun.title: Dry Run (no emails sent)
dryRun.description: Recommended for first run. Drafts everything but does NOT send emails.
